input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.2.5.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.2.5.4
            TITLE: the presentation itself will not be interrupted by questions.  immediately following the

            CONTENT:
            rule S.2.5.4: The presentation itself will not be interrupted by questions.  Immediately following the
S.2.5.4 The presentation itself will not be interrupted by questions.  Immediately following the 
presentation there may be a question and answer session.

final_answer: The presentation itself will not be interrupted by questions. Immediately following the presentation there may be a question and answer session.
